name: place_ports
short_description: Automatically place a set of ports
full_help:
place_ports

Description: 
Automatically place a set of ports

Syntax: 
place_ports  [-skip_unconnected_ports] [-check_only] [-iobank <args>] [-quiet]
             [-verbose] [<ports>...]

Usage: 
  Name                       Description
  --------------------------------------
  [-skip_unconnected_ports]  Do not place unconnected ports
  [-check_only]              Only check IO/Clock placement DRCs
  [-iobank]                  Limit placement to the following banks
  [-quiet]                   Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]                 Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<ports>]                  Ports to place (if omitted, all ports will be 
                             placed).  If the arguments are interleaved 
                             objects of ports and package pins, then manual 
                             placement is performed

Categories: 
PinPlanning

arguments.description: Limit placement to the following banks
Suspend message limits during command execution
